summary: Iteration 21: Referral Contest System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: Admin Contests tab and Parent Invite & Earn tab fully verified with all features working.
critical_code_review_comments: Contest CRUD endpoints properly implemented with authentication
Public endpoints (active contest, leaderboard) work without auth as expected
Leaderboard aggregates from referrals collection with proper date filtering
Display names properly masked for privacy (e.g., 'Allen A.')
Contest banner shows countdown timer and runner-up prizes
Currency formatting uses CurrencyContext formatAmount function
seed_data_creation: Test contest created and deleted during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral contest system fully working. Existing contest 'March Madness Referral Blitz' is LIVE with $200 prize, $100 2nd place, 6 Months Premium 3rd place. Admin can create/pause/delete contests. Parent portal shows contest banner with countdown, leaderboard (currently empty), stats (referred count, total earned, friends saved), and referral history.

admin_contest_crud.create: POST /api/admin/contests - creates contest with title, prize, dates, runner_up_prizes - WORKING

public_contest_endpoints.active: GET /api/contests/active - returns active contest or empty object - WORKING
public_contest_endpoints.leaderboard: GET /api/contests/leaderboard - returns ranked users with optional contest_id filter - WORKING
